label: AppleScript • scripted multi-literal slot mapping
query: Create the note using the provided subject as its title and the provided body as its body.
notes: Model-free CI anchor for the multi-literal `contents` map. One canned script maps {{subject}} into the note-name slot and {{body}} into the body slot; the mock records the write under the (expanded) subject key so the final state proves BOTH named literals landed in the RIGHT slots, verbatim. No tokens.

contents.subject: Weekly Status
contents.body:
All systems nominal.
No blockers this week.

finalState.equals:
All systems nominal.
No blockers this week.
